/usr/bin/c++  -Werror -Wall -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_g2s_load.dir/test_unit.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_g2s_load.dir/__/__/src/cuda_utils.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_g2s_load.dir/common/test_utils.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_g2s_load.dir/cell/test_g2s_load_generated_test_g2s_load.cu.o -o test_g2s_load   -L/data/yincao/cuda-12.4/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/data/yincao/cuda-12.4/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/data/yincao/cuda-12.4/lib64:/home/yincao/.local/lib /data/yincao/cuda-12.4/lib64/libcudart.so ../../lib/libgtest.a /home/yincao/.local/lib/libglog.so.0.7.1 -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
